[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001001 2
1 01111111 7
2 11001001 4
3 10101101 5
4 00100111 4
5 11011111 7
6 01000110 3
7 00001001 2

12 21 00000111 3
23 32 01000110 3 match 6
34 43 00000000 a

56 65 01001001 3
67 76 00000000 a
70 07 00010010 2

60 06 10001001 3
71 17 00100010 2

14 41 00000001 1
25 52 01011111 6
36 63 01000000 1
47 74 00000000 a
50 05 00011111 5
61 16 00000001 1
72 27 00010010 2

04 40 00001001 2 match 0 7
15 51 00100111 4 match 4
26 62 11001001 4 match 2
37 73 00000010 1
